description_long: This is a two-story brick commercial building with a flat roof, featuring a retail storefront at street level. The facade includes a red awning over a sidewalk café area with tables and chairs, and a large mural or decorative panel on one side. The building has black metal fire escapes on the side and rear, and the back area is cluttered with green dumpsters, graffiti, and HVAC units. The structure is set on a city street corner with crosswalks, street lamps, and some potted plants. The upper story has several windows, and the roof is equipped with utility boxes and a small rooftop structure.
description: A two-story brick retail building with a red awning, sidewalk café, mural, fire escapes, and urban street details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red awning, outdoor café tables, mural, and main entrance on the street corner.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the fire escape, potted plants, and partial view of the café and mural.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying green dumpsters, graffiti, HVAC units, and the building's service area.
description_view_3: Opposite street view showing the secondary building entrance, bench, and more sidewalk details.
attribute_storefront_signage: A large mural or decorative panel with a stylized yellow and white design on a purple background.
